title: Reports and Publications - Alcohol and Drug Prevention - Health Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Reports and Publications - Alcohol and Drug Prevention - Health Canada
The following publications concerning alcohol and other drugs have been developed by Health Canada:
- Youth & Problematic Substance Use
- Driving While Impaired
- Treatment and Rehabilitation
- Focus on Gender - A National Survey of Canadians' Use of Alcohol and Other Drugs - Canadian Addiction Survey (CAS)
- Reducing the Harm Associated with Injection Drug Use in Canada 2001, 66 pages, Cat. H39-589/2001E, ISBN 0-662-30878-6
- International Guidelines for the Estimation of the Avoidable Costs of Substance Abuse 2006
- Public Opinion, Attitudes and Knowledge - A National Survey of Canadians' Use of Alcohol and Other Drugs - Canadian Addiction Survey (CAS) 2006, 114 pages, Cat. H128-1/06-491E, ISBN 0-662-44537-6
- Substance Use by Canadian Youth - A National Survey of Canadians' Use of Alcohol and Other Drugs - Canadian Addiction Survey (CAS) 2007, 114 pages, Cat. H128-1/07-499E, ISBN 978-0-662-45219-5
- A Study of Resiliency in Communities 1998, 99 pages, CAT. H39-470/1999E, ISBN: 0-662-27676-0
- Resilient Children of Parents Affected by a Dependency 2004, 41 pages

- Preventing problematic substance use by enhancing student well-being
- Workshop Summary Report - Best Practices - Treatment and Rehabilitation for Seniors with Substance Use Problems, March 6 and 7, 2003 - Table of Contents
- Best Practices - Treatment and Rehabilitation for Seniors with Substance Use Problems 2002, 147 pages, Cat. H46-2/03-295E, ISBN 0-662-33394-2
